title: Concepts
content:
Concepts

Mother oppresses son. Son goes through all forms of abuse and sees it affecting him as he becomes a man. He turns to all different forms of abuse. Drugs, alcohol, sleep derprivation, starvation, etc. After finall hitting bottom a strange occurrence happens: he is transported back in time where he has the opportunity to impregenate his own mother and raise himself to grow up and be a better human being. A dream foreshadowed this and although he is reluctant to do it he wants to give himself an opportunity to be normal.
